title: Hide list-player
description: Plugin that allows players to become completely invisible on the server — hidden from tab list, commands, and player detection.
body:
This plugin allows a player to completely hide their presence on the server. Once activated, the hidden player will not appear in the tab list, cannot be found with common server commands (such as /list or /who), and is invisible to other players. It is useful for administrators who want to monitor activity without being noticed, for content creators who need a clean recording environment, or for custom gameplay mechanics that require a “ghost mode.”

The plugin is lightweight, configurable, and designed to work seamlessly without affecting normal server performance.
